<!--
Thanks for contributing to parqet.beer! Please fill out the sections below.
For beverage data PRs, see CONTRIBUTING.md#adding-a-beverage for the required fields.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences explaining what this PR does and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new user-facing feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] data — beverage data change
- [ ] refactor — code change with no behavior change
- [ ] test — test-only change

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

## Beverage data (only if Type = data)

- **Source URL**:
- **Date checked**:
- **Curation justification** (craft / specialty / indie):
- **Currency note** (if EUR or CHF was converted rather than observed):

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (and new code has tests)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or config changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.dev.vars` content committed
- [ ] Beverage data PR includes source URL, date, and justification (above)
- [ ] Commits use Conventional Commits and are `Signed-off-by` (DCO)
